description: Progressive pibo debug telemetry CLI with bounded summaries, drill-down commands, cursor/aggregate provider events, preview-unavailable diagnostics, stale work, stats, prune, and JSON output.

userStories.title: Register telemetry debug command root and help
userStories.description: As an agent, I want pibo debug telemetry help to show the available drill-down workflow without dumping data.
acceptanceCriteria: Register a pibo debug telemetry command branch under the existing debug CLI
Root help lists sessions, session, turn, provider, tool, stale, stats, and prune subcommands with one-line descriptions
Root help includes compact next examples and does not query or print telemetry rows
Existing debug CLI commands keep their current behavior
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement telemetry sessions list command
userStories.description: As an operator, I want to list recent, active, or stale telemetry sessions so that I can find work to inspect.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement pibo debug telemetry sessions with bounded default row limit and hard maximum limit
Support --active, --stale, --limit, and --json; any aliases must be documented in help and tests
Rows include piboSessionId, status, active turn when known, active phase when known, queue depth when known, last progress age, stale indicator, and next command
Support --json with equivalent bounded data and truncation metadata
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement telemetry session detail command
userStories.description: As an agent with a session id, I want a compact session detail view so that I know which turn to inspect next.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement pibo debug telemetry session <pibo-session-id>
Output includes status, queue depth, active turn, active phase, stale age, last progress time, provider request id when known, and bounded recent turns
Output includes next command suggestions for the active turn and related provider/tool ids when known
Default output omits raw provider payloads, full headers, transcripts, normalized event payloads, and full tool args
Support --json with ids and next suggestions for agent drill-down
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement telemetry turn timeline command
userStories.description: As a runtime engineer, I want a turn timeline so that open or stale phases are visible without inferring them from raw events.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement pibo debug telemetry turn <turn-id-or-event-id>
Output lists ordered phases with name, status, start, end or open marker, duration, last progress, stale age when applicable, providerRequestId, and toolCallId when known
Output highlights open phases and missing terminal events
Support --events only for bounded linked event references, not raw payload dumps
Support --json with phase rows and next suggestions
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement provider request summary command
userStories.description: As a provider engineer, I want a provider request summary so that I can see request lifecycle and stream counters at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement pibo debug telemetry provider <provider-request-id>

Output includes session id, turn id, provider, API, model, transport, status, HTTP status when known, first byte time, last raw event time, last normalized event time, upstream response id when known, and terminal error category when safe
Output includes raw event counts grouped by type plus parse error and unknown event counts
Output includes next command for provider events listing
Support --json with equivalent fields
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement provider event metadata listing command
userStories.description: As a parser engineer, I want a paged provider event metadata list so that I can inspect stream shape without raw payload dumps.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement pibo debug telemetry provider <provider-request-id> events
Support --after cursor/sequence paging and --limit with hard maximum; aliases are allowed only if documented in help and tests
Rows include sequence, timestamp, event type, byte size, parse status, normalized type when known, item id when known, and toolCallId when known
Support --fields for allowlisted safe fields only
Default output omits raw JSON payload bodies
Support --json with cursor and truncation metadata
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement optional provider preview/unavailable command
userStories.description: As an operator, I want an explicit preview command to return one bounded preview only when preview storage is enabled, and otherwise report that previews are unavailable.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement pibo debug telemetry provider <provider-request-id> payload <preview-or-event-summary-id> only if the CLI keeps a preview command in V1
Command requires an explicit preview id or event-summary id and uses a small default max-bytes limit with a hard maximum
When preview storage is disabled or unavailable, output a clear safe message and do not read arbitrary raw provider payloads
When a bounded preview exists, output preview text only up to the limit plus truncated, byteSize, contentType, and capture-mode metadata
Support --json with equivalent metadata/unavailable result
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Depends on PRD 02 preview contract. Optional; do not run unless preview command remains in V1 scope.

userStories.title: Implement telemetry tool-call detail command
userStories.description: As a tool engineer, I want a tool-call detail view so that I can distinguish partial args from execution failures.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement pibo debug telemetry tool <tool-call-id>

Output includes toolCallId, tool name, session id, turn id, providerRequestId when known, status, argsBytes, firstDeltaAt, lastDeltaAt, argsCompletedAt, parseStatus, safeArgKeys, execution start/end, and safe error message/category when available
Output explicitly shows no execution start when args never completed
Default output omits full argument bodies, stdout, stderr, and raw payloads
Support --json with equivalent fields and next suggestions
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement stale telemetry command
userStories.description: As an operator, I want to list stale active work so that I can inspect likely stuck sessions without mutating them.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement pibo debug telemetry stale using the stale detector service, provider/profile-aware threshold settings, and an optional --threshold-ms override for inspection
Rows include piboSessionId, turnId, active phase, stale duration, queue depth when known, last progress time, applied threshold, threshold source, and next command
Command is read-only and does not abort, clear, or modify sessions
Support --json with equivalent fields
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Depends on PRD 05 stale detector/settings stories. If PRD 04 runs earlier, implement command shell only and finish after PRD 05.

userStories.title: Implement telemetry stats and prune commands
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want stats and dry-run pruning so that telemetry disk usage can be managed safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement pibo debug telemetry stats with counts and byte sizes grouped by retention class, including incident where present
Implement pibo debug telemetry prune requiring retention class and cutoff date
Prune defaults to dry-run and requires an explicit apply/destructive flag to delete rows
Prune output reports rows and bytes affected and does not touch non-telemetry stores
Support --json for stats and prune outputs
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
